title: CPBR's Create & Collaborate
description: Create & Collaborate : A Multiplayer Create focused Modpack
body:
# CPBR's Create & Collaborate

Embark on an enhanced vanilla Minecraft experience with **CPBR's Create & Collaborate**, a carefully curated modpack centered around the Create mod and its expansive ecosystem. This pack is designed to provide an immersive and optimized **multiplayer adventure**.

The key feature of this pack is the **Create Mod** and its ecosystem of addons.

## Why I created this pack

I created this pack because I couldn’t find a Create-focused modpack that truly fit what I was looking for. Most modpacks I tried either included magic mods or advanced tech mods that quickly turned the game into a race for overpowered armor and tools, or had quests dishing out insane rewards, completely skipping most parts of the Create progression. This obviously wasn’t the experience I wanted.

Instead, I envisioned a modpack that captured the Hermitcraft-style feel, a collaborative multiplayer world where players could focus on building, automation, exploration, and having fun together. So, I decided to make my own modpack for my friends and me to enjoy.

The official whitelist-only server will be available soon.

## Mod list
